# Test HTTP server edge cases with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive environment variables
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=1s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=800ms

# Start server
bg bash 'go run main.go'
sleep 500ms

# Test very long URL (should handle gracefully)
bash '
url="https://httpbin.org/get?$(printf "param%d=value%d&" {1..50})"
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_get\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"$url\"}}}" | timeout 3s go run main.go
'
stdout '"status_code"'

# Test POST with large body
bash '
large_body=$(printf "data%s" {1..100})
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 2, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_post\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"https://httpbin.org/post\", \"body\": \"$large_body\"}}}" | timeout 3s go run main.go
'
stdout '"status_code"'

# Test special characters in URL
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 3, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_get\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"https://httpbin.org/get?test=hello%20world&special=%21%40%23\"}}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout '"status_code": 200'

# Test custom headers
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 4, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_request\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"https://httpbin.org/headers\", \"method\": \"GET\", \"headers\": {\"Custom-Header\": \"test-value\"}}}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout '"Custom-Header"'
stdout '"test-value"'

# Test rapid sequential requests (stress test)
bash 'for i in {1..5}; do echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": $i, \"method\": \"tools/list\"}" | timeout 1s go run main.go > /dev/null; done'

# Test Unicode in request body
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 5, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_post\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"https://httpbin.org/post\", \"body\": \"{\\\"unicode\\\": \\\"こんにちは\\\"}\", \"headers\": {\"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"}}}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout '"status_code": 200'

# Cleanup
exec pkill -f "go run main.go" || true
